name: Loop Dashboard opens and shows iterations with stats
description: When the user clicks the Loop Dashboard button in the header, a modal opens showing the iteration log with stats (iterations count, tests banked, bugs caught, CI/CD status) and a list of expandable iteration entries.

planSteps.description: Verify the top header bar contains a button labeled for the Loop (with an activity/pulse icon)
Click the Loop button in the header to open the Loop Dashboard modal
Verify a modal dialog opens overlaying the page with a title 'Loop Dashboard'
Verify the modal shows a stats grid with at least four stat cards (Iterations, Tests Banked, Bugs Caught, CI/CD Status)
Verify the modal shows a list of iteration entries (numbered iter-01, iter-02, etc.)
Click on one of the iteration entries in the list to expand it
Verify the expanded iteration shows three sections labeled Maker, Verify (Checker), and Fix with text content
Close the modal by clicking the X button in its header
Verify the modal is no longer visible
